scripts.coco4gui:prepare: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=backend:backend/agent python scripts/prepare_coco4gui_for_vertex.py
scripts.dataset:combined: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=backend:backend/agent python scripts/prepare_combined_dataset.py --custom
scripts.dataset:combined:all: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=backend:backend/agent python scripts/prepare_combined_dataset.py --custom --traces
scripts.dev: cd apps/web && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:desktop: cd apps/desktop && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && doppler run -- uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.backend:docker: cd backend && docker build -t echo-backend . && docker run -p 8000:8000 echo-backend
